description: You are reviewing the schedule for a 'Community Center Renovation' project. Two non-milestone tasks in the schedule are currently 'dangling' with no successor tasks, breaking the Critical Path validation. Identify these two tasks and link them as Finish-to-Start predecessors to the 'Project Completion' milestone (Task ID 12) to ensure the schedule logic is closed. Save the corrected project as an XML file to /home/ga/Projects/renovation_fixed.xml.
